params.name: Mount Hua Postcard
params.description: A commemorative postcard specially created by the dev team, featuring high-definition photos showcasing the beauty of Mount Hua. It would make a perfect souvenir for yourself and your friends who have never witnessed the beauty of Mount Hua!
